name: VASCULAR BREAST DISEASE
definition: loss of normal blood supply → infarction of breast tissue most commonly associated with
dominant_finding: unilateral dilatation of breast veins ← axillary or subclavian vein blockage
discriminating_features: unilateral dilatation of breast veins ← axillary or subclavian vein blockage
bilaterally enlarged breast veins ← occlusion of SVC

general: unilateral dilatation of breast veins ← axillary or subclavian vein blockage
bilaterally enlarged breast veins ← occlusion of SVC
solitary lobulated mass with single cystic space (lymphangioma circumscriptum) /
